## Checklist

- [ ] Targets `dev` branch (not `main`)
- [ ] All new/modified docs have valid YAML frontmatter
- [ ] No duplicated content (reference existing docs, don't copy)
- [ ] Cross-references resolve (linked files exist)
- [ ] Follows naming conventions (kebab-case files, proper structure)
